name: Protection from Evil and Good
components: M (holy water or powdered silver and iron, which the spell consumes)
description: Until the spell ends, one willing creature you touch is protected against certain types of creatures: Aberrations, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead. The protection grants several benefits. Creatures of those types have Disadvantage on attack rolls against the target. The target also can't be charmed, frightened, or possessed by them. If the target is already affected, the creature's effect is suspended for the duration.
